title: westringia davidii
intro: Westringia davidii, also known as Coaster Westringia, is a native Australian shrub that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is commonly used in herbal medicine. The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the management of stress and anxiety. Westringia davidii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
